author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: fused_adam_f32/f64, fused_gru_cell_f32/f64. Fused Adam updates param, first-moment, and second-moment in a single MSL pass (avoids 3 separate kernel launches). fused_gru_cell computes gates + hidden state update in one dispatch. Both are performance wins over the unfused path.
